infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to take photos of receipts for payment tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photos to select receipt images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save receipt images to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to take receipt photos for payment records.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your photos to select receipt images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to take receipt photos.

plugins.fileSystemPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your files for backups and receipt storage.
